subtasks.description: Query spend data for current month and prior 3 months, calculate 3-month average and variance metrics, identify anomalies using statistical thresholds (normal_variance < 15%, concerning 15-30%, critical > 30%)
Reconcile current month spend against 3-month baseline, classify each anomaly into normal_variance, concerning, or critical buckets based on deviation percentage and business context rules

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks (not one) because the query explicitly requires both spend computation AND classification logic. The sql_gen task handles the analytical heavy lifting (multi-month aggregation, variance calculation, anomaly detection) at mid tier due to window functions and multi-row aggregation. The cross_recon task at mid tier applies the classification framework and determines posture (normal_variance/concerning/critical) based on deviation thresholds and business rules. This is lighter downstream work that benefits from the structured sql output, so mid tier is appropriate for reliable classification without over-provisioning to frontier.

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "WITH monthly_spend AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date) AS spend_month,
    publisher,
    product,
    SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend
  FROM consumption_facts
  WHERE event_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date), publisher, product
),
current_month AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    product,
    total_spend AS current_spend
  FROM monthly_spend
  WHERE spend_month = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
),
prior_3_months AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    product,
    AVG(total_spend) AS avg_3mo_spend,
    STDDEV(total_spend) AS stddev_3mo_spend,
    MIN(total_spend) AS min_3mo_spend,
    MAX(total_spend) AS max_3mo_spend,
    COUNT(*) AS months_of_data
  FROM monthly_spend
  WHERE spend_month >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
    AND spend_month < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
  GROUP BY publisher, product
),
anomaly_analysis AS (
  SELECT
    cm.publisher,
    cm.product,
    cm.current_spend,
    p3.avg_3mo_spend,
    p3.stddev_3mo_spend,
    p3.min_3mo_spend,
    p3.max_3mo_spend,
    p3.months_of_data,
    CASE
      WHEN p3.avg_3mo_spend IS NULL OR p3.avg_3mo_spend = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE ROUND(((cm.current_spend - p3.avg_3mo_spend) / p3.avg_3mo_spend) * 100, 2)
    END AS variance_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN p3.avg_3mo_spend IS NULL OR p3.avg_3mo_spend = 0 THEN cm.current_spend
      ELSE cm.current_spend - p3.avg_3mo_spend
    END AS spend_delta
  FROM current_month cm
  LEFT JOIN prior_3_months p3
    ON cm.publisher = p3.publisher
    AND cm.product = p3.product
)
SELECT
  publisher,
  product,
  ROUND(current_spend, 2) AS current_month_spend,
  ROUND(avg_3mo_spend, 2) AS avg_3mo_spend,
  ROUND(stddev_3mo_spend, 2) AS stddev_3mo_spend,
  ROUND(min_3mo_spend, 2) AS min_3mo_spend,
  ROUND(max_3mo_spend, 2) AS max_3mo_spend,
